articles.title: LaDiR: Latent Diffusion Enhances LLMs for Text Reasoning
articles.snippet: Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate their reasoning ability through chain-of-thought (CoT) generation. However, LLM’s autoregressive decoding may limit the ability to revisit and refine earlier tokens in a holistic manner, which can also lead to inefficient exploration for diverse solutions. In this paper, we propose LaDiR (Latent Diffusion Reasoner), a novel reasoning framework that unifies the expressiveness of continuous latent representation with the iterative refinement capabilities of
articles.ai_summary: A new framework called LaDiR (Latent Diffusion Reasoner) enhances Large Language Models (LLMs) for better text reasoning by allowing iterative refinement of responses. This aims to improve the exploration of diverse solutions.
articles.why_it_matters: Advances the capabilities of LLMs, potentially leading to more accurate and nuanced AI responses.
